# SafeHarbor Behavioral Health

> Trauma-informed emotional wellness services for children and teens ages 3-17 in Tulsa, Oklahoma. ODMHSAS certified. Medicaid/SoonerCare accepted.

## About

SafeHarbor Behavioral Health provides evidence-based emotional wellness support for children and teens in the Tulsa metro area. Founded by Adam James, we deliver group sessions in daycare and after-school settings through our innovative Body & Brain program, which combines movement-based activities with therapeutic intervention.

We are certified by the Oklahoma Department of Mental Health and Substance Abuse Services (ODMHSAS) and accept Medicaid/SoonerCare, Blue Cross Blue Shield, United Healthcare, Aetna, Cigna, Health Choice, Community Care, and TriCare.

Our approach is trauma-informed, culturally sensitive, and focused on meeting children where they are — in their daily environments.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com - Overview of services, programs, and how to get started
- About Us: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/about - Our mission, values, and founder story
- Services: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/services - Full list of 14 behavioral health services
- Body & Brain Program: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/programs/body-brain - Our signature movement-based therapy program
- For Parents: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/parents - Parent resources and enrollment info
- Partner With Us: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/partners - Facility partnership opportunities for daycares and gyms
- Blog: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/blog - Mental health resources and insights
- Locations: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/locations - 15 service areas across Tulsa metro
- Contact: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com/contact - Schedule appointments and get in touch

## Services

- Individual Therapy: One-on-one emotional wellness support for children and teens
- Group Therapy: Structured group sessions building skills, connection, and confidence
- Body & Brain Integration: Innovative movement-based program connecting physical wellness with emotional regulation
- Family Support: Strengthening family bonds through collaborative sessions
- ADHD & Focus: Practical strategies and behavioral interventions for school and home
- Trauma Recovery: Compassionate, trauma-informed care for difficult experiences
- Medication Management: Medication evaluation and follow-up visits
- Psychiatric Evaluation: Comprehensive diagnostic assessments
- Teen Counseling: Adolescent-focused care for stress, mood, and life transitions
- Child Therapy: Age-appropriate support for children ages 3-12
- School Support: Coordination with school settings for academic success
- Parent Coaching: Practical parent guidance for routines and behavior support
- Behavioral Assessments: Structured assessments to identify strengths and needs
- Crisis Intervention: Rapid support and stabilization planning

## Conditions We Treat

Depression, Anxiety Disorders, PTSD and Trauma, ADHD, Bipolar Disorder, OCD, Eating Disorders, Substance Use Disorders, Grief and Loss, Behavioral Challenges, School Refusal, Social Anxiety

## Service Areas

Main Office: 2510 East 15th Street, Tulsa, OK 74104
Areas Served: Downtown Tulsa, Midtown Tulsa, Brookside, Cherry Street, Broken Arrow, Owasso, Jenks, Bixby, Sand Springs, Sapulpa, South Tulsa, North Tulsa, East Tulsa, West Tulsa, Union District

- Phone: (918) 553-5746
- Email: support@safeharborbehavioralhealth.com
- Website: https://www.safeharborbehavioralhealth.com
- Easy Enrollment: https://SafeHarborEasyEnrollment.com
- Crisis Line: 988 (24/7)
- Office Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 9am-2pm
